name: rag-recall: searchMemories surfaces the right memories
description: Each case embeds a query and calls searchMemories(userId, query). The test passes if any of the listed expected_ids appears in the top-N results. This file is NOT runnable until a seeded test user with the canonical fixture data exists. See `tests/integration/embeddings.test.ts` for the seeding pattern.

fixture.seed_data_summary: 5 photos (beach, dinner, garden, birthday, hike), 4 people (Sarah daughter, Robert son, Maria neighbor, Bill brother), 5 life facts (taught school, gardens daily, married 1972, retired 2010, loves jazz), 4 events (doctor appt, granddaughter wedding, lunch with Sarah, gardening club)

cases.name: beach query
cases.query: What did we do at the beach?

cases.name: birthday query
cases.query: Tell me about the birthday party

cases.name: doctor appointment query
cases.query: When is my next doctor's appointment?
